productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Casual Brown Wallets
description: Crafted from soft leather, this brown from Reid and Taylor is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a textured finish, this bi-fold wallet has an embossed brand name on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use.Dimensions: 11 cm X 9 cmSoft leather for flexibility and durabilityTwo compartments with fabric inner lining on the insideMultiple partitions on the bi-fold to stash away cards CareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
